title: OmniaBench: Benchmarking General AI Agents Across Diverse Scenarios

official_code_release.timing_boundary: The audited commit is approximately 17 hours after arXiv v1 publication and is not treated as exact paper-time code.

official_dataset_release.timing_boundary: The audited dataset revision is approximately 2.4 hours after arXiv v1 publication and is not silently equated with an immutable paper-time artifact.
official_dataset_release.license_status: The card declares omniabench-research-only while also saying final dataset terms are pending; the code repository's Apache-2.0 license does not resolve dataset redistribution terms.

audit_scope.paper: Complete 31-page PDF including appendices A-H read from local extraction and checked against the PDF.
audit_scope.release: All 644 released task rows loaded; key unions, identifiers, language, labels, rubric counts, task hashes, environment/verifier syntax, repository tree, runner, judge, verifier, scoring, filesystem, and Python-executor paths inspected.
audit_scope.execution: The 36 repository Python files compiled successfully. No repository tests were present. Embedded environment code was statically parsed; 642 of 644 rows parsed and two contained syntax errors. No paid model evaluation was run.
audit_scope.not_available: The full 1,431-task collection, source-to-taxonomy evidence, construction annotations, reference trajectories, paper result rows, traces, judge outputs, error annotations, and scripts/artifacts regenerating manuscript analyses were not released in the audited revisions.
